title: Collapsible
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Collapsible primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger activation, ARIA expanded and controls relationships, root/trigger/panel state data attributes, disabled trigger behavior, and panel mounting policy.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Collapsible primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Collapsible primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and trigger presses emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model in response to CollapsibleOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: ARIA controls relationships use caller-provided ids instead of generated React ids.
deviations.rationale: Installable render helpers are pure and deterministic. Consumers provide stable root or panel ids when they need aria-controls wiring.

deviations.summary: Transition status and panel dimensions are explicit inputs rather than DOM-measured internal state.
deviations.rationale: Base UI measures scroll dimensions for animated panels. Foldkit registry primitives stay pure; shared animation measurement belongs in a future runtime policy or consumer command.
